generalStatus.message: We are currently investigating multiple issues affecting several services.

updates.message: We are currently investigating widespread issues affecting multiple services. App Services are currently unavailable, Web Services are experiencing significant performance degradation, and Authentication, API, and Download Services are partially impacted.

Our monitoring systems previously detected abnormal traffic patterns consistent with a DDoS attack. The issue has now been contained, and all affected services have been restored to a stable and fully operational state.

The connection issues caused by the mistakenly released update have been fully resolved. All systems are now stable and operating normally. This issue was entirely caused by the Pinrush team; no third parties or service providers were involved.
